title: Microfibre Mops for Cleaning Floors: Flat Floor Mop with 4 Washable Pads Wet Dry Mopping for Hard Wood Laminate Tile Vinyl Home Kitchen Surfaces Walls - 150cm Adjustable Handle
features: Microfibre Mops for Cleaning Floors: The floor mops for hard floor come with adjustable long handle, flexible, lightweight but sturdy, great for housewives, the elderly, children or any home with pets
Floor Mop with Washable Pads: 4 reusable mop cloths are super durable and absorbent to remove daily dirt dust and grime, machine washable and easy to attached and remove with velcro

Flat Mop with Adjustable Handle: Flat mop with 150cm / 59in long handle, can be extended 32-59 inches for comfortable cleaning, not only suitable for adults and kids, but also can be used as a wall ceiling wiping mop

Dust Mop for Hard Wood Floors: This microfibre mop suitable for most hard surfaces such as laminate, hardwood, wood, tile, vinyl, marble, ceramic, stone, bamboo, lvp floors, glass windows, walls and ceilings

Kitchen Mop with Rotatable Head: 360°swivel flat mop head can easily reach to most narrow and hard-to-reach areas in your home, such as baseboard, under furniture, small spaces in the kitchen and bathroom

Wet & Dry Mop Sweep Away Most Dirts: The floor mops for laminate floors can be used as bathroom wet mop or kitchen mop to easily wipe up sewage, oil stains, stagnant water, or it can be used as a dry mop to efficiently sweep up hair, debris and dust, just like a dust broom
Reusable Multi-purpose Cleaning Mop: The wood floor mops are perfect for use in apartment dorm kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, living room or hotel, college, office and more indoor scenes
